LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT IN THIS MATTER IS A CORPORATION, AND CANNOT BE REPRESENTED IN PRO PER. PER COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER, THE JULY 25, 2013 COURT ORDER HAS BEEN COMPLIED WITH. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Behmke Reporting And Video Services, Inc. To Complay With Investigative Subpoena
Off Calendar Aug-07-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DAVID ELIGATOR, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, 415.703.2982, FOR PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA.
PAULA BEHMKE IS ALSO PRESENT IN COURT.

RULING: matter discussed. Respondent in this matter is a corporation, and cannot be represented in pro per. PER COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER, THE JULY 25, 2013 COURT ORDER HAS BEEN COMPLIED WITH. The Court VACATED its tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Petition To Compel Behmke Reporting And Video Services, Inc. To Comply With Investigative Subpoena IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR6185.
